description:
The RotationConstantInitializer component gives all particles a starting rotation of ``Value`` along their orientation axis.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Value: The starting rotation to give particles along their orientation axis.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
